mapper.insert: /* InsrOrderMapper.regIntmInsrCanInfo */ INSERT INTO MSP_INTM_INSR_CAN_INFO ( INSR_CAN_NUM , CONTRACT_NUM , INSR_PROD_CD , STRT_DTTM , END_DTTM , NCN , CTN , CUST_ID , CAN_RSLT_CD , REGST_ID , REGST_DTTM ) SELECT INSR_CAN_NUM_SEQ.NEXTVAL , A.CONTRACT_NUM , A.INSR_PROD_CD , A.STRT_DTTM , A.END_DTTM , B.SVC_CNTR_NO , B.SUBSCRIBER_NO , B.CUSTOMER_ID , 'UNQ' , #{sessionUserId} , SYSDATE FROM MSP_INTM_INSR_ORDER A , MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO B WHERE A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum} AND A.INSR_PROD_CD = #{insrProdCd} AND A.STRT_DTTM = #{strtDttm}
mapper.sql:
SELECT B.SUBSCRIBER_NO AS subscriberNo /* 전화번호 */ , B.SUB_LINK_NAME AS subLinkName /* 고객명 */ , A.CONTRACT_NUM AS contractNum /* 계약번호 */ , FN_GET_CODENM('RCP0037', B.SUB_STATUS) AS subStatusNm /* 계약상태 */ , FN_GET_ORGNM(B.OPEN_AGNT_CD) AS openAgntNm /* 개통대리점 */ , FN_GET_RATENM(A.INSR_PROD_CD) AS insrProdNm /* 보험상품명 */ , A.REQ_IN_DAY AS reqinday /* 신청일자 */ , A.STRT_DTTM AS strtDttm /* 시작일자 */ , A.END_DTTM AS endDttm /* 종료일자 */ FROM MSP_INTM_INSR_READY A , MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO B WHERE A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM AND A.WORK_CD = 'I' AND A.PROC_CD = 'N' AND B.SUB_STATUS != 'C'
AND A.REQ_IN_DAY BETWEEN #{searchFromDt} || '000000' AND #{searchToDt} || '235959'
AND A.STRT_DTTM BETWEEN #{searchFromDt} || '000000' AND #{searchToDt} || '235959'
AND B.CONTRACT_NUM = #{searchVal}
AND B.SUB_LINK_NAME LIKE #{searchVal} || '%'
AND B.SUBSCRIBER_NO = REPLACE(#{searchVal},'-')
ORDER BY A.REQ_IN_DAY, B.SUB_LINK_NAME
